items.summary: 活下去，然后慢慢变好千万别死，我是真的喜欢这个美术。这美术放在二游市场绝对数一数二，加油啊！！！！另外提一嘴，这游戏是中国网络可以玩的吗，为什么这么卡？

items.title: [正面] This is gonna go down as my favorite game of all t...
items.summary:
This is gonna go down as my favorite game of all time, maybe better than Elden Ring and maybe even Baldr Sky.

The art is top notch. Devs spared no effort in the game design whatsoever. Gameplay is pretty easy to get the hang of but not easy to master. But that's what makes it fun! I love every single mechanic and the story man.. I love the story! Its just so peak. Everything about this game is peak. Im completely f2p but im still enjoying it so very much. Will probably put another 200 hours into it or more!

The only way I can describe this game is...

[h1] Absolute Cinema. [/h1]

Edit: Devs, if you ever take the servers down for this game, I would PAY for an offline port. Please make one if you ever decide to take down the servers, this old man begs.

Edit: 50 hours in and it only gets better. Play this game.

Edit 04/18/2025: The ONLY reason I haven't been on this game is because i've been on Helldivers, which is peak.. Plus i've been reading Shadow Slave.. DONT SLEEP ON THIS GAME THOUGH!!

Edit 05/10/2025: I really want to play this game again but mann.. SHADOW SLAVE IS PEAK MAN WHAT THE HECK?! If you liked this game, you'll love reading Shadow Slave probably :) Check it out! Its a free web novel. Im hooked! STILL PLAY THIS GAME THOUGH!!
